untranslatable_reason: Signal requires correlation analysis between two time series (Series A and Series B) with lead-lag relationship detection and dynamic coherence monitoring. The allowed indicator set does not include correlation coefficients, multi-series analysis, or lag detection operators. Conditions requiring: 'correlation >= 0.75', 'correlation drops below 0.40', 'Series A leads Series B by 3-5 bars', and 'divergence persists for 2 bars' cannot be expressed using only single-series price/technical indicators and basic comparison operators. This signal fundamentally requires bivariate statistical analysis not supported by the current indicator vocabulary.
translation_notes: Attempted placeholder conversion using mean reversion around SMA_50 as proxy for 'mean reversion in lagging series', but this does not capture the core signal logic of correlation divergence detection. A proper implementation would require custom correlation and lead-lag indicators added to the backtest engine.
